PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\subbit1\\Desktop\\CS\\img\\" -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match 'png|jpg|jpeg|webp' } | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, @{N='Modificado';E={$_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('dd/MM HH:mm'\)}})
